title: Documentation, Change, Lifecycle, and Monitoring
description: Operate a living network source of truth with baselines, telemetry, alerts, configuration, and service ownership. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of an operations and observability runbook while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Maintain diagrams, inventories, IPAM, maps, SLAs, and configuration sources of truth.
Use safe change, lifecycle, backup, patch, and decommissioning processes.
Collect and correlate monitoring evidence without mistaking data volume for observability.
